prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic advertising photograph inside a clean modern supermarket aisle, shot from a very low wide-angle camera mounted near the front of a shopping cart as it rushes toward the viewer. A young athletic man leans aggressively over the cart handle, pushing fast, wearing a white soccer-style jersey with black shoulder stripes, a small black swoosh-like chest logo, and the letters “LG” on the chest; he has short dark hair, muscular arms, and a black smartwatch. Place a large fluffy sheep lying on its back inside the metal shopping cart, belly up, with both front legs raised and ears visible, as if surprised by the speed. Obscure both the man’s face and the sheep’s face with flat rectangular beige censor blocks. Show exactly 8 visible grocery items flying or sitting in the cart: 1 yellow box flying in the upper left background, 1 tan packaged food block flying at left, 1 red soda can flying at right, 1 blue potato chip bag inside the cart, 1 brown bread or toast package at lower left, 1 red bell pepper at the front left, 1 red tomato below it, and 1 blurred white-and-blue carton flying in the lower right foreground. Use dramatic motion blur along the supermarket shelves on both sides, bright linear ceiling lights streaking overhead, shallow depth of field, crisp metal cart rails in the foreground, high-speed action energy, glossy commercial lighting, realistic textures, and a chaotic humorous premium supermarket ad atmosphere. Vertical 4:5 composition, centered cart, subject looming close to the camera, no extra text, no watermark.
